game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Shadow Of Death: Premium Games:** Players control a chosen hero in a 2D side-scrolling action RPG, navigating linear stages using a virtual joystick for movement and on-screen buttons to execute basic attacks and 3-5 unique active skills, each with specific mana costs and cooldowns (e.g., 5-15 seconds). Combat involves engaging waves of diverse enemies, requiring strategic use of skills to deplete their health points, with successful hits generating mana and experience points. Progression is tied to hero leveling, which unlocks new skill tree nodes that enhance abilities (e.g., +10% damage, -0.5s cooldown) and allows equipping various rarity gear (common to legendary) dropped by enemies, modifying stats like attack, defense, and health. Stages feature increasing enemy density, mini-bosses, and final boss encounters with unique attack patterns, while an "Arena" mode pits players against AI-controlled versions of other heroes in 3-round matches for exclusive gear. A stage is won by defeating all enemy waves and the final boss, but the player loses if their hero's health points drop to zero, requiring a retry.
game_info.description: Enter the arena as a legendary hero in this 2D action RPG! Battle through waves of enemies, defeat powerful bosses, and level up your character. Use strategic combinations of skills with different cooldowns and mana costs to overcome increasingly challenging foes. Collect gear drops to enhance your stats and unlock powerful skill upgrades. Your goal: survive all enemy waves and defeat the final boss to claim victory!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right and jump
Z: Basic attack (generates mana)
Space: Skill 1 - Power Strike (15 mana, 5s cooldown)
Shift: Skill 2 - Whirlwind (25 mana, 8s cooldown)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement and attack mechanics. Validates that the player can move left/right, jump, and perform basic attacks that generate mana and deal damage to enemies.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move around the arena randomly, jump periodically, and spam basic attacks. Test collision detection with enemies and ensure mana generation works correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should move smoothly, attacks should hit enemies and generate mana, and no errors should occur. The test passes if the player can survive for at least 10 seconds performing these basic actions.

TEST_1.expected: Player should move smoothly, attacks should hit enemies and generate mana, and no errors should occur. The test passes if the player can survive for at least 10 seconds performing these basic actions.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing optimal win strategy. This validates that the game can be won by strategically using all available mechanics including movement, attacks, skills, and leveling.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Maintain distance from enemies when health is low, use basic attacks to build mana, deploy skills strategically when enemies cluster or face bosses. Prioritize survival while maximizing damage output through skill rotation.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player defeats all enemy waves and the final boss, achieving GAME_OVER_WIN state. Success criteria: reach GAME_OVER_WIN within a reasonable timeframe (before timeout).

TEST_3.test_description: Testing skill system mechanics including cooldowns, mana costs, and skill effects. Validates that skills can only be used when mana is sufficient and cooldowns are ready.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Alternate between basic attacks to generate mana and using skills as soon as they become available. Monitor cooldown timers and mana levels to ensure proper resource management.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Skills trigger correctly when conditions are met, deal appropriate damage, and respect cooldown/mana constraints. Test passes if no skill-related errors occur over 20 seconds of gameplay.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing level progression and stat increases. Validates that gaining experience from defeating enemies leads to level-ups that increase player stats.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Focus on defeating as many enemies as possible to gain experience points. Track level-ups and verify stat increases occur properly.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player successfully levels up at least twice, with each level-up providing stat bonuses. Health, damage, and other stats should increase appropriately.
TEST_4.description: Testing level progression and stat increases. Validates that gaining experience from defeating enemies leads to level-ups that increase player stats.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing enemy AI and combat interactions. Validates that enemies spawn correctly, move toward the player, attack, and take damage appropriately.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Engage enemies in combat, allowing them to approach and attack. Test different enemy types and verify they behave according to their patterns.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Enemies spawn in waves, pursue the player, deal damage on contact, and are defeated when health reaches zero. Combat feels balanced and responsive.
